INVOKE.COMMENT: --- get member count and SI details from DB for updating status to SUSPENDED ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>'0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: -- check if data is present in response ---

Values.value: SocialInteraction Members count for %responseListSize% Social Interactions retrieved for setting SI status to SUSPENDED

SEQUENCE.NAME: %remainingSize%>0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: -- Update Social Interaction Status to Suspended --

Values.value: SocialInteraction with id %SocialInteractions/socialInteractionId% --- status set to SUSPENDED

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interactions members data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
